narrative:
Precinct Sylvania Township G (precinct in Lucas County) has 1,160 registered voters, with 54.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.0%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.5 percentage points.
